hyperedges.label: Full Scan Pipeline: market fetch → signal → broker → DB
Trade Resolution Pipeline: PM outcome → temp fetch → DB resolve → bias update
Metrics Dashboard Data Flow: DB → compute → render
Temperature Market Signal Pipeline: bias correction → ensemble → edge calculation → confidence tiering
Shared Kelly Sizing Pattern across Temperature, TSA, and Crypto edge calculators
Three parallel Polymarket market fetchers covering temperature, TSA, and crypto market types

nodes.label: Signal Generation Pipeline
nodes.rationale: The pipeline ingests NWP ensemble forecasts, computes ensemble statistics, nowcasts with live observations, integrates a Student-t distribution for bucket probability, calculates edge vs market price, applies entry filters, and sizes with fractional Kelly. This design captures model consensus uncertainty and exploits divergence from market pricing.

nodes.label: Fractional Kelly Sizing
nodes.rationale: Uses 25% fractional Kelly with tier scaling and a hard $15/trade cap. Fractional Kelly reduces variance relative to full Kelly, and the hard cap prevents catastrophic loss on single positions.

nodes.label: Atomic Trade Open Design (stake deducted at entry)
nodes.norm_label: atomic trade open design (stake deducted at entry)

nodes.norm_label: monte carlo nwp error injection design

nodes.label: Hard Boundary Constraint Design (METAR sensor offset)
nodes.norm_label: hard boundary constraint design (metar sensor offset)

nodes.label: Student-t Heavy Tails for Extreme Buckets
nodes.norm_label: student-t heavy tails for extreme buckets

nodes.label: King Models Conflict Detection (ECMWF vs GFS)
nodes.norm_label: king models conflict detection (ecmwf vs gfs)

nodes.label: Wunderground Last-Resort Fallback Pattern
nodes.rationale: Wunderground is used as the third and final fallback for temperature resolution (after Iowa State ASOS and Open-Meteo Archive) because it may differ from official records; it is also used for live intraday obs in the nowcaster in an advisory-only capacity.

nodes.label: Retry with Exponential Backoff
nodes.rationale: Retries up to 3 attempts with 2s/4s backoff on transient HTTP errors (429/500/502/503/504), ConnectionError, and Timeout to handle WU rate limiting and intermittent availability.

nodes.label: Imperial-to-Celsius Conversion Fallback
nodes.rationale: WU JSON may provide temperatures under 'metric' or 'imperial' sub-objects; metric is preferred, but the code falls back to converting imperial Fahrenheit to Celsius when metric is absent.

hyperedges.label: Full Scan Pipeline: market fetch → signal → broker → DB
Trade Resolution Pipeline: PM outcome → temp fetch → DB resolve → bias update
Metrics Dashboard Data Flow: DB → compute → render
Temperature Market Signal Pipeline: bias correction → ensemble → edge calculation → confidence tiering
Shared Kelly Sizing Pattern across Temperature, TSA, and Crypto edge calculators
Three parallel Polymarket market fetchers covering temperature, TSA, and crypto market types
